CustomField.description: This field is created for internal purposes to identify the current SRR used in MR calculations based on the latest approved utilization. Based on this check, the 'Current Rate' dynamic related list is conditionally displayed.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is created for internal purposes to identify the current SRR used in MR calculations based on the latest approved utilization. Based on this check, the 'Current Rate' dynamic related list is conditionally displayed.
CustomField.label: _Is Current SRR
